steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “counterintuitive effect” directly signals the target meaning: rising prices caused increased demand despite normal economic expectations. The blank must name the process by which the price increase led to more demand.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: D) Engendering means ‘causing to arise’ and precisely captures how the price surge created (nurtured) new demand. A), B), and C) either reverse the relationship (e.g., exploiting implies taking advantage, not creating) or misdefine the process (e.g., monetizing focuses on profit, not demand). That matches choice D — D is correct.
